params.description: Vertical picture graph appears. Favorite Drinks data. Juice has 5 symbols, Milk has 3 symbols, Water has 6 symbols, Lemonade has 4 symbols. Key: each symbol = 5 students.

beats.text: Look at the completed graph. How many students chose Water?

validator.description: Student selected 30, correct. 6 symbols times 5 equals 30.

params.description: Water column highlights to confirm selection.

beats.text: 30 students. 6 symbols, each worth 5. Count by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30. That's how you read a scaled graph.

elements.description: Vertical picture graph in reading mode. Favorite Drinks data. Juice has 5 symbols, Milk has 3 symbols, Water has 6 symbols, Lemonade has 4 symbols. Key: each symbol = 5 students. Multiple choice tool active.
